case_title: RASAVONG, KHAMMINH VS PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CIRCOSTA IRON & METAL CO.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RASAVONG, KHAMMINH AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY CIRCOSTA IRON & METAL CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASAVONG, KHAMMINH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY CIRCOSTA IRON & METAL CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
